title: Nether Bombs!
description: Adds bombs that randomly appear in the Nether. Bring them to the overworld, dump them in water, and disarm them for Netherite Scraps!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/DF2_YG8SDfI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Nether Bombs introduces randomly generating explosives in the Nether! With 3 levels of difficulty, you must grab the bomb and RUN back to the Overworld to jump in water! This defuses the bomb, giving the carrier gold, diamonds, and Netherite Scrap!

Defeat various mobs to earn more precious seconds to your fuse, and run, RUN!

 

Music and sound from the game "Pizza Tower"
